productFlows: DOCX import preview accept open scene

runtimePathFindings.docxExport: cmd.project.export.docxMin reaches handleExportDocxMin and runDocxMinExport through canonical runtime and direct compatibility paths.
runtimePathFindings.docxImport: cmd.project.importDocxV1 coordinates previewLocalFile, previewImportPlan, importSafeCreate, then renderer opens the created scene.
runtimePathFindings.markdownImport: cmd.project.importMarkdownV1 uses preview plus safe-create and opens the created scene from the refreshed tree.
runtimePathFindings.markdownExport: cmd.project.exportMarkdownV1 Save As forwards saveAs/defaultName to the backend and requires saved-file proof.
runtimePathFindings.mindmap: Derived modules and bridge/status artifacts are present; no user-facing Mindmap export command is claimed.
